title: Appointment of Designated Custodian under Section 18 (1) the CM(SP) Act [SO 1271(E) dated 21.03.2018]

Gare-Palma-IV/7 (Chhattisgarh) [F. No. CBA2-13016/1/2018-CBA2] RAJESH KUMAR SINHA, Jt.
